row_sql: id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(win) = 4)
id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(win) = 3)
id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(win) > 0)
col_sql: id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(lip_sync_wins) >= 3)
id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(lip_sync_wins) = 3)
id IN (SELECT id FROM queens GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(lip_sync_wins) >= 2)
row_desc: Queen has four mini challenge wins.
Queen has three mini challenge wins.
Queen has at least one mini challenge win.
col_desc: Queen has at least three lip sync wins.
Queen has three lip sync wins.
Queen has at least two lip sync wins.
